description_long: This bungalow is a detached, single-family residence set within a fenced lot featuring a manicured front yard, paved driveway, and a rear garden with a swimming pool and patio. The house has a gabled roof with multiple peaks, prominent front-facing windows, and a covered entry porch. The backyard includes a pool, hot tub, and a shaded seating area surrounded by mature trees and landscaping. The property is enclosed by a low fence, with a paved walkway leading from the street to the front door. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, with large windows providing ample natural light. The overall layout is spacious, with clear separation between the front approach, living spaces, and recreational backyard.
description: A spacious, light-colored bungalow with a gabled roof, front porch, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes mature trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, front yard, and symmetrical facade with a covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, backyard pool, hot tub, and adjacent patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, hot tub, shaded seating area, and mature trees along the back fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, pool, and a pergola or shaded structure in the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
